name: Reasonable Cause Exception for Partnership Late Filing

eligibility.description: Available to partnerships that fail to file Form 1065 or required tracking reports on time but can prove the delay was due to circumstances beyond their control.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Avoid the per-partner monthly penalty for failing to file a partnership return or tracking report by demonstrating that the failure was due to reasonable cause.
